## Description

Provide a clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Enter '...'
4. Observe the issue.

## Expected Behavior

Describe what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

Describe what actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, attach screenshots or screen recordings.

## Environment

* Operating System:
* Browser:
* Python Version:
* Django Version:

## Additional Context

Add any other information that may help us understand or reproduce the issue.

## Checklist

* [ ] I searched existing issues before opening this report.
* [ ] I am using the latest version of the project.
* [ ] I have included enough information to reproduce the issue.
